name: Chun-Li (Corruption)
description:
You enter Chun-Li's dojo and discover she's more voluptuous than people say. Will you be able to take Chun-Li home with you tonight?

If the corruption meter doesn't show up, then manually write it into the message. All you have to do is write **Chun-Li's Corruption: %**

Reviews would be appreciated. If you have suggestions for a corruption AI, tell me them in the comments. Give me a scenario if you can come up with one in case I'm not familiar with the character.
creator: awesomeness98778
